description: Google Workspace Admin SDK provides programmatic administration of a Google Workspace organization, including users, groups, devices, data transfers, and reporting. It is part of Google's admin tooling for managing Workspace domains.
summary: admin.googleapis.com exposes a Google Workspace Admin SDK HTTP API surface at `https://admin.googleapis.com/`, documented across Directory, Chrome Printer Management, Data Transfer, and Reports references, authenticated with Google OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens.
